## Checklist
- [ ] Tokens use `var(--*)` references only
- [ ] `python3 scripts/check-token-refs.py` passes
- [ ] Tested at desktop, tablet (≤767px), and phone (≤480px)
- [ ] Dark mode checked
- [ ] Page title follows `[Category] – [Component] – adamdanielbest Design System`
- [ ] Dynamic date present in meta
- [ ] SVG icons use kebab-case IDs (if applicable)
- [ ] `/review` skill run and feedback addressed
